lines.speaker: Aeonisig Raispher
lines.text: Please only talk to the King if it's important. He has a heavy burden to bear with the running of his Kingdom.

lines.speaker: Aeonisig Raispher
lines.text: Apologies! Allow me to introduce myself: my name is Aeonisig Raispher, special advisor to King Roald on spiritual matters.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Special advisor on spiritual matters? What does that mean?

lines.speaker: Aeonisig Raispher
lines.text: It means that some decisions the King has to make might have unforeseen repercussions on the nation's spiritual sensibilities. My duty is to ensure that Saradominist ideals are not stomped underfoot.

lines.speaker: Aeonisig Raispher
lines.text: My main function is to ensure that King Roald is apprised of all options, especially those that favour the righteous followers of Saradomin.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But surely the King should be able to make his own decisions on what's best for Misthalin?

lines.speaker: Aeonisig Raispher
lines.text: What an interesting perspective you have! Totally unworkable of course, but interesting nonetheless.

lines.speaker: Aeonisig Raispher
lines.text: I took my religious and combat training in several parts of the known world. I've also fought despicable beasts in the wilderness in Saradomin's name. Needless to say I have great experience in the ways of the world and am

lines.speaker: Aeonisig Raispher
lines.text: an invaluable aid to his lordship's decision-making process.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did you come to be an advisor to King Roald?

lines.speaker: Aeonisig Raispher
lines.text: The King of Misthalin, like any great leader, always requires the best advice and the best advisors. He very often summons occasional advisors to help him in certain situations, but it was felt by the Church of Saradomin

lines.speaker: Aeonisig Raispher
lines.text: that a full time advisor on religious matters was needed to ensure fair treatment of Saradomin's followers.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How come he doesn't have an advisor for any other religious denominations?

lines.speaker: Aeonisig Raispher
lines.text: Because I simply won't stand for it, that's why! Now, enough of your impertinent questions. I have work to do!
